query:
SELECT 'news_articles' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total, MAX(created_at) as last_insert FROM news_articles
UNION ALL
SELECT 'research_reports', COUNT(*), MAX(created_at) FROM research_reports
UNION ALL
SELECT 'editorials', COUNT(*), MAX(created_at) FROM editorials
UNION ALL
SELECT 'startups_of_day', COUNT(*), MAX(created_at) FROM startups_of_day;
